---
title: Solid-state Batteries
alias: &ALIAS SSBs
image: featured.png
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

Solid-state batteries are pivotal for the next generation of energy storage, offering a transformative leap in both safety and energy density over conventional lithium-ion systems.

Driven by this potential, my research focuses on:

- Unlocking the atomistic mechanisms behind fast ion conduction in inorganic solid-state electrolyte materials; \
- developing and characterizing novel composite electrolytes that combine the fast ionic transport of inorganic conductors with the flexibility of ionically active polymers; and \
- unraveling lithium exchange dynamics at solid-solid interfaces.

<figure style="text-align: center;">
    <img src="featured.png" alt="Featured Image" style="display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; width: 800px; height: auto;">
</figure>


## Related Publications


:::{#pubs}
:::
